summary: P1.8-9 Workflow Templates sub-tab: grouped mock threshold sliders and automation toggles for all six validated workflows; session-local state; advanced styling; no approval or execution actions.

interfaceChanges.description: Advanced Workflow Templates sub-tab with per-workflow mock settings.
Mock template definitions and session-local persistence helpers.

mappings.criterion: Workflow Templates sub-tab reachable from Decisions; not the default tab
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue198_decisions_templates.test.tsx::is not the default Decisions tab — Recommended stays selected on load

mappings.criterion: At least one configurable control per workflow group (mock)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue198_decisions_templates.test.tsx::renders at least one configurable control per workflow group

mappings.criterion: No approval or execution actions on Templates tab
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue198_decisions_templates.test.tsx::does not surface approval toolbar or execute actions

mappings.criterion: Component test: sub-tab switch shows template groups
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue198_decisions_templates.test.tsx::shows template groups for all six validated workflows after sub-tab switch
